mapper.sql: id, moc_no, change_type, title, requester_name, requester_dept, request_date, target_date, reason, scope, risk_method, risk_result, risk_review_date, risk_opinion, status, plan_approver_name, plan_approved_at, completion_approver_name, completion_approved_at, reject_reason, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, deleted, created_at, modified_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_psm_moc WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_moc WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tb_psm_moc WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_moc WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_moc WHERE moc_no LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_psm_moc (moc_no, change_type, title, requester_name, requester_dept, request_date, target_date, reason, scope, risk_method, risk_result, risk_review_date, risk_opinion, status, plan_approver_name, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{mocNo}, #{changeType}, #{title}, #{requesterName}, #{requesterDept}, #{requestDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{targetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reason}, #{scope}, #{riskMethod}, #{riskResult}, #{riskReviewDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{riskOpinion}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'DRAFT'), #{planApproverName}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{modifiedByTeam}, #{modifiedByPosition}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_psm_moc SET change_type = #{changeType}, title = #{title}, requester_name = #{requesterName}, requester_dept = #{requesterDept}, request_date = #{requestDate,jdbcType=DATE}, target_date = #{targetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, reason = #{reason}, scope = #{scope}, risk_method = #{riskMethod}, risk_result = #{riskResult}, risk_review_date = #{riskReviewDate,jdbcType=DATE}, risk_opinion = #{riskOpinion}, status = #{status}, plan_approver_name = #{planApproverName}, completion_approver_name = #{completionApproverName}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_psm_moc SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
